titleEn: Egyptians Drive out Hyksos, New Kingdom Egyptian
descriptionEn: The New Kingdom of Egyptian history begins with the expulsion of the Hyksos from the northern part of Egypt where they had been ruling as the fifteenth Egyptian dynasty.
